classes.name: Barbarian
classes.description: A fierce warrior of primitive background who can enter a battle rage. Barbarians are fierce warriors from the wilds. They live for the thrill of battle and revel in the joy of conquest.

subclasses.name: Path of the Berserker
subclasses.description: High damage but exhaustion drawback. Frenzy allows extra attacks but causes exhaustion levels, making sustained use costly.

subclasses.name: Path of the Totem Warrior
subclasses.description: Extremely durable. Bear Totem grants resistance to almost all damage types while raging — best tanking option in the game.

subclasses.name: Path of the Ancestral Guardian
subclasses.description: Protects allies via ancestral spirits. Marks enemies and imposes disadvantage on attacks against anyone but you.

subclasses.name: Storm Herald
subclasses.description: Aura damage that scales with level but remains inconsistent. Tundra, Desert, and Sea auras offer different elemental riders.

subclasses.name: Zealot
subclasses.description: High damage bonus and extremely hard to kill — Rage Beyond Death lets you stay at 0 HP without death saves while raging.

subclasses.name: Beast
subclasses.description: Strong natural weapon scaling. Bestial Soul options provide claws, bite, and tail — good damage and bonus mobility.

subclasses.name: Battlerager
subclasses.description: Weak scaling melee tank. Very limited — spiky armor adds minor damage but falls off quickly at higher levels.

subclasses.name: Wild Magic
subclasses.description: Random magical surges on rage — mixed value. Unpredictable but some effects are very powerful if they proc at the right time.

classes.name: Bard
classes.description: An inspiring magician whose power echoes the music of creation. Bards use their artistry to inspire, enchant, and unravel mysteries.

subclasses.name: College of Lore
subclasses.description: Best versatility. Cutting Words debuffs enemies on any roll, and Magical Secrets at level 6 gives access to any spells in the game.

subclasses.name: College of Valor
subclasses.description: Balanced but outclassed by Swords and Lore. Grants Extra Attack and Combat Inspiration, but less flexible overall.

subclasses.name: College of Swords
subclasses.description: Mobile melee bard with Blade Flourish maneuvers — strong burst and mobility. Defensive Flourish can push AC temporarily.

subclasses.name: Glamour
subclasses.description: Strong party repositioning via Mantle of Inspiration. Enthralling Performance grants crowd control in social situations.

subclasses.name: Whispers
subclasses.description: Burst psychic damage via Psychic Blades plus fear mechanics. Strong against single targets but heavily resource dependent.

subclasses.name: Creation
subclasses.description: Object creation utility via Performance of Creation. Mote of Potential augments Bardic Inspiration with powerful effects.

subclasses.name: Eloquence
subclasses.description: Best social + control bard. Unsettling Words lowers saving throws, and Unfailing Inspiration ensures dice are never wasted.

subclasses.name: College of Spirits
subclasses.description: Ghost-story themed bard using Tales from Beyond to randomly generate powerful effects — healing, damage, or control based on die roll.

subclasses.name: Dance
subclasses.description: Highly mobile bard buffing allies through movement and melee synergy. Strong party enabler but not top raw power.

classes.name: Cleric
classes.description: A priestly champion who wields divine magic in service of a higher power. Clerics are intermediaries between the mortal world and the distant planes of the gods.

subclasses.name: Life Domain
subclasses.description: Best raw healing output. Disciple of Life adds bonus HP to every healing spell, and Heavy Armor proficiency adds durability.

subclasses.name: Light Domain
subclasses.description: Strong AoE damage. Warding Flare imposes disadvantage on attacks, and Radiance of the Dawn deals AoE radiant damage.

subclasses.name: Trickery Domain
subclasses.description: Illusions and stealth access. Invoke Duplicity creates a duplicate, but weaker compared to other cleric subclasses overall.

subclasses.name: War Domain
subclasses.description: Strong early game with War Priest bonus attack action. Falls off later as martial options don't scale as well.

subclasses.name: Twilight
subclasses.description: One of the strongest subclasses in the game. Twilight Sanctuary grants temp HP or ends charm/fear every turn in a 30 ft radius.

subclasses.name: Order
subclasses.description: Action economy manipulation. Voice of Authority lets an ally attack whenever you cast a spell on them — excellent synergy.

subclasses.name: Grave
subclasses.description: Prevents death and stabilizes the party. Path to the Grave doubles the next damage instance on a creature — deadly with smites.

subclasses.name: Peace
subclasses.description: Broken-level party buffs. Emboldening Bond adds 1d4 to attacks and saves for multiple allies — permanently active.

subclasses.name: Arcana
subclasses.description: Wizard-like spell access. Arcane Mastery at level 17 grants access to extremely powerful wizard spells.

subclasses.name: Knowledge
subclasses.description: Skill-heavy but weak combat. Visions of the Past and Potent Spellcasting offer utility but limited combat contribution.

subclasses.name: Tempest
subclasses.description: Burst lightning damage. Destructive Wrath maximizes thunder/lightning damage — paired with Call Lightning for massive burst.

subclasses.name: Forge
subclasses.description: Extremely durable buffer. Soul of the Forge grants +1 AC in heavy armor and resistance to fire — strong early and late game.

subclasses.name: Death
subclasses.description: Necrotic niche damage. Reaper lets cantrips hit two targets and Indestructible forms of Undead are strong for DM characters.

subclasses.name: Nature
subclasses.description: Weak druid-like cleric. Limited domain spells and features don't offer strong enough return compared to other cleric options.

classes.name: Druid
classes.description: A priest of the Old Faith, wielding the powers of nature – moonlight and plant growth, fire and lightning – and adopting animal forms.

subclasses.name: Circle of the Moon
subclasses.description: Wild Shape combat dominance. Combat Wild Shape allows bonus action shifting, and Elemental Forms at level 10 are nearly unstoppable.

subclasses.name: Circle of the Land
subclasses.description: Reliable control caster with Natural Recovery for spell slot restoration. Solid but lacks burst compared to Moon or Stars.

subclasses.name: Stars
subclasses.description: Very flexible and strong. Starry Form grants Archer (bonus ranged attacks), Chalice (bonus healing), or Dragon (concentration boost).

subclasses.name: Shepherd
subclasses.description: Summon scaling is extremely strong. Faithful Summons and Speech of the Woods with Aura of the Guardian make summons unkillable.

subclasses.name: Spores
subclasses.description: Melee hybrid with Halo of Spores damage and Symbiotic Entity granting temp HP equal to 4× Wild Shape uses.

subclasses.name: Wildfire
subclasses.description: Mobility + damage + healing. Enhanced Bond boosts spell damage and healing, and Wildfire Spirit offers consistent teleportation.

subclasses.name: Dreams
subclasses.description: Healing and mobility via Hearth of Moonlight and Balm of the Summer Court. Mechanically weak compared to other druid options.

classes.name: Fighter
classes.description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor. Fighters share an unparalleled mastery with weapons and armor.

subclasses.name: Champion
subclasses.description: Simple but low ceiling. Improved Critical and Remarkable Athlete are passive features — easy to play but rarely optimal.

subclasses.name: Battle Master
subclasses.description: Best martial control toolkit. Superiority Dice power diverse maneuvers — Trip, Disarm, Rally, Precision — for unmatched tactical flexibility.

subclasses.name: Eldritch Knight
subclasses.description: Defensive magic access. War Magic grants bonus attack after a cantrip, and spell access adds Shield and Absorb Elements for durability.

subclasses.name: Rune Knight
subclasses.description: Huge utility and scaling. Runes grant diverse benefits — Giant's Might enlarges you for extra damage and grapple advantage.

subclasses.name: Echo Knight
subclasses.description: Extremely strong battlefield manipulation using an echo clone to extend reach, create extra attacks, and provide teleportation-like positioning.

subclasses.name: Cavalier
subclasses.description: Strong protector via Unwavering Mark — attacks against marked targets provoke a bonus attack from you. Great on mounted builds.

subclasses.name: Samurai
subclasses.description: Burst advantage engine. Fighting Spirit grants advantage and temp HP three times per day, and Rapid Strike enables extra attack for damage.

subclasses.name: Psi Warrior
subclasses.description: Psionic versatility. Telekinetic Adept and Psionic Strike add psychic damage and forced movement — interesting but resource-limited.

subclasses.name: Purple Dragon Knight (Banneret)
subclasses.description: Fighter subclass focused on battlefield leadership and ally support, but mechanically underpowered compared to other Fighter archetypes.

subclasses.name: Arcane Archer
subclasses.description: Limited uses and weak scaling. Arcane Shot options are creative but running out of uses mid-combat is a frequent problem.

classes.name: Monk
classes.description: A master of martial arts, harnessing the power of the body in pursuit of physical and spiritual perfection.

subclasses.name: Way of the Open Hand
subclasses.description: Good early game. Open Hand Technique adds prone, push, or no-reaction effects on Flurry of Blows — falls off in later tiers.

subclasses.name: Way of Shadow
subclasses.description: Stealth and teleport niche. Shadow Arts grants minor illusion cantrip and Darkness, and Shadow Step teleports between darkness areas.

subclasses.name: Way of the Four Elements
subclasses.description: Too ki-expensive. Elemental disciplines cost more ki than equivalent spells, making it less efficient than other monk subclasses.

subclasses.name: Mercy
subclasses.description: Hybrid DPS and Healer. Hands of Harm adds necrotic damage, Hands of Healing cures conditions, and Visage of the Hand grants fear and blind.

subclasses.name: Way of the Long Death
subclasses.description: Survivability focused. Touch of Death grants temp HP on kills, Mastery of Death prevents death once per ki, Hour of Reaping frightens all nearby enemies.

subclasses.name: Kensei
subclasses.description: Weapon monk scaling. Agile Parry adds +2 AC with unarmed strike, and Sharpen the Blade stacks magic bonuses on chosen weapons.

subclasses.name: Astral Self
subclasses.description: Strong scaling astral arms extend reach and grant extra attack. Visage of the Astral Self grants darkvision and intimidation advantage.

subclasses.name: Way of the Ascendant Dragon
subclasses.description: Dragon-themed monk that replaces unarmed strike damage with elemental breath effects, provides flight and mobility scaling, and enhances battlefield control.

subclasses.name: Sun Soul
subclasses.description: Ranged monk option. Radiant Sun Bolt adds a ranged attack option but ki costs for Searing Arc Strike make it less efficient.

subclasses.name: Drunken Master
subclasses.description: Mobility trickery. Drunken Technique adds disengage and bonus movement on Flurry of Blows — fun but not top-tier damage.

classes.name: Paladin
classes.description: A holy warrior bound to a sacred oath. Paladins are united by their oaths to stand against the forces of evil.

subclasses.name: Oath of Devotion
subclasses.description: Classic but basic. Sacred Weapon adds CHA to attacks and Sacred Flame is solid but other oaths simply offer more raw power.

subclasses.name: Oath of the Ancients
subclasses.description: Magic resistance aura at level 7 is exceptional, but other features are less impactful compared to stronger oath options.

subclasses.name: Oath of Vengeance
subclasses.description: Top single-target burst. Vow of Enmity grants advantage and Misty Step on spell list allows incredible repositioning for smite builds.

subclasses.name: Redemption
subclasses.description: Damage mitigation via Aura of the Guardian absorbs damage for allies. Pacifism restrictions are limiting but the defensive power is real.

subclasses.name: Oathbreaker
subclasses.description: Extremely strong dark-themed paladin with necrotic damage, fear control, undead synergy, and high burst smite potential. Requires DM approval.

subclasses.name: Oath of the Noble Genies
subclasses.description: Extremely strong elemental paladin with high mobility, flexible resistances, and strong smite augmentation. Level 20 capstone grants pseudo-wish for saving rolls.

subclasses.name: Crown
subclasses.description: Strong defender via Champion Challenge — forces enemies to attack you instead of allies. Divine Allegiance absorbs ally damage.

subclasses.name: Conquest
subclasses.description: Fear lockdown. Aura of Conquest deals psychic damage and reduces speed to 0 for frightened creatures — devastating with fear spells.

subclasses.name: Watchers
subclasses.description: Anti-magic support. Aura of the Sentinel adds proficiency bonus to initiative and Vigilant Rebuke counterspells as a reaction.

subclasses.name: Glory
subclasses.description: Mobility focus. Inspiring Smite distributes temp HP after smites and Peerless Athlete grants athletics/acrobatics advantage — solid but not top tier.

classes.name: Ranger
classes.description: A warrior who uses martial prowess and nature magic to combat threats on the edges of civilization.

subclasses.name: Hunter
subclasses.description: Generic damage options. Colossus Slayer and Horde Breaker add extra damage but lack the burst and utility of better ranger subclasses.

subclasses.name: Beast Master
subclasses.description: Weak action economy — beast attacks require your action or bonus action. Primal Companion helps but still action-starved compared to others.

subclasses.name: Gloom Stalker
subclasses.description: Best ambush subclass. Dread Ambusher adds extra attack and damage on turn 1, Umbral Sight grants invisible-in-darkness, Stalker's Flurry prevents misses.

subclasses.name: Swarmkeeper
subclasses.description: Battlefield manipulation. Gathered Swarm deals bonus damage and forces movement — push enemies off ledges or pull allies to safety.

subclasses.name: Drakewarden
subclasses.description: Strong drake companion with scaling resistances. Drake gains flight at level 7 and shares resistances with the ranger — very strong scaling.

subclasses.name: Horizon Walker
subclasses.description: Mobility and planar damage. Planar Warrior adds force damage, Ethereal Step grants misty step as a bonus action — strong positioning.

subclasses.name: Fey Wanderer
subclasses.description: Charm and combat mix. Dreadful Strikes adds psychic damage, and Beguiling Twist redirects charm/fear effects against the caster.

subclasses.name: Monster Slayer
subclasses.description: Situational. Slayer's Prey adds extra damage on first hit per turn, and Magic-User's Nemesis counters spellcasters — niche but functional.

classes.name: Rogue
classes.description: A scoundrel who uses stealth and trickery to overcome obstacles and enemies. Rogues have many faces: a swindler, bounty hunter, or guild thief.

subclasses.name: Thief
subclasses.description: Item interaction focus. Fast Hands applies Cunning Action to Use Object, Supreme Sneak grants permanent advantage in stealth, Use Magic Device unlocks any magic item.

subclasses.name: Assassin
subclasses.description: Surprise-dependent. Assassinate grants automatic crits on surprised targets — devastating opener but situational and GM-dependent.

subclasses.name: Arcane Trickster
subclasses.description: Best rogue flexibility. Mage Hand Legerdemain and spell access grant unique options — Booming Blade synergizes with Sneak Attack.

subclasses.name: Swashbuckler
subclasses.description: Strong duelist. Fancy Footwork prevents opportunity attacks after melee, Panache grants charmed condition, Solo Sneak Attack enables Sneak without ally.

subclasses.name: Soulknife
subclasses.description: Psionic reliability. Psychic Blades always work (no ammunition), Psi-Powered Leap grants flight, and Rend Mind can paralyze on hit.

subclasses.name: Phantom
subclasses.description: Strong scaling necrotic damage from Wails from the Grave — hits a second target for half Sneak Attack damage, excellent against groups.

subclasses.name: Mastermind
subclasses.description: Tactical but niche. Master of Tactics lets you Help from 30 ft away but the overall feature set is weak compared to other rogue options.

subclasses.name: Inquisitive
subclasses.description: Detection specialist. Insightful Fighting grants Sneak Attack without ally but requires a bonus action check — unreliable in fast combat.

subclasses.name: Scout
subclasses.description: Mobility and exploration. Skirmisher lets you move as a reaction when an enemy ends their turn nearby, Survivalist grants expertise in Nature/Survival.

classes.name: Sorcerer
classes.description: A spellcaster who draws on inherent magic from a gift or bloodline. Sorcerers carry a magical birthright conferred upon them by an exotic bloodline.

subclasses.name: Draconic Bloodline
subclasses.description: Durable but simple. Draconic Resilience adds 1 HP per level and base AC 13+DEX, and Elemental Affinity boosts same-element damage — straightforward.

subclasses.name: Wild Magic
subclasses.description: Random magical surges with mixed value. Tides of Chaos grants advantage once, triggering a Wild Magic Surge — Bend Luck is excellent reaction.

subclasses.name: Divine Soul
subclasses.description: Best spell flexibility. Access to the entire Cleric spell list combined with Sorcerer's Metamagic makes this the most versatile healing caster.

subclasses.name: Aberrant Mind
subclasses.description: Best psionic caster. Telepathic Speech, free subtle-spelled psychic spells, and Warping Implosion at level 18 for massive forced movement.

subclasses.name: Clockwork Soul
subclasses.description: Extremely optimized spell list from Mechanus. Restore Balance removes advantage/disadvantage and Trance of Order makes attacks never miss at level 18.

subclasses.name: Shadow
subclasses.description: Darkness synergy. Eyes of the Dark creates a magical darkness only you can see through, Hound of Ill Omen imposes disadvantage on saves.

subclasses.name: Storm
subclasses.description: Mobility and lightning. Tempestuous Magic lets you fly 10 ft as a bonus action after a spell, and Storm's Fury reflects lightning on attackers.

classes.name: Warlock
classes.description: A wielder of magic that is derived from a bargain with an extraplanar entity. Warlocks are seekers of the knowledge that lies hidden in the fabric of the multiverse.

subclasses.name: The Archfey
subclasses.description: Charm and illusion niche. Fey Presence charms/frightens in 10 ft, Misty Escape grants invisibility as a reaction — creative but limited uses.

subclasses.name: The Fiend
subclasses.description: Sustained damage and temp HP. Dark One's Blessing grants temp HP on kill — keeps the warlock alive in extended combat encounters.

subclasses.name: The Great Old One
subclasses.description: Telepathy-heavy RP subclass. Awakened Mind grants telepathy, Create Thrall mind-controls, but combat features are weaker than other patrons.

subclasses.name: Genie
subclasses.description: Extremely flexible patron power. Genie's Vessel grants a rest space, Sanctuary vessel buff, and elemental damage augmentation — top tier utility.

subclasses.name: Celestial
subclasses.description: Healing warlock. Healing Light pool grants dice-based healing, and Radiant Soul adds radiant damage to fire/radiant spells — unique support role.

subclasses.name: Hexblade
subclasses.description: Top-tier melee warlock. Hexblade's Curse adds proficiency bonus to damage and crits, Hex Warrior uses CHA for weapon attacks, grants medium armor.

subclasses.name: Fathomless
subclasses.description: Water and tentacle battlefield control. Tentacle of the Deeps deals cold damage and reduces speed by 10 ft on hit — strong zone control.

subclasses.name: Undead
subclasses.description: Form of Dread grants temp HP, fear on hits, and immunity to fear — strong control and durability with excellent sustained fight presence.

classes.name: Wizard
classes.description: A scholarly magic-user capable of manipulating the structures of reality. Wizards are supreme magic-users, defined and united as a class by the spells they cast.

subclasses.name: School of Abjuration
subclasses.description: Best defensive wizard. Arcane Ward absorbs damage, Projected Ward extends it to allies — strong survivability focus with Spell Resistance at level 14.

subclasses.name: School of Conjuration
subclasses.description: Teleport and summons. Minor Conjuration creates small objects and Focused Conjuration prevents concentration from breaking on conjuration spells.

subclasses.name: School of Divination
subclasses.description: Portent is game-breaking. Two d20 rolls each long rest that replace any roll you choose — automatic crits or automatic failures on demand.

subclasses.name: School of Enchantment
subclasses.description: Mind control niche. Hypnotic Gaze charms creatures each turn, and Alter Memories makes targets forget being charmed — powerful social and combat tool.

subclasses.name: School of Evocation
subclasses.description: Safe AoE damage. Sculpt Spells excludes chosen creatures from area effects, making Fireball safe for allies — consistent and reliable.

subclasses.name: School of Illusion
subclasses.description: High creativity ceiling. Malleable Illusions can be changed as an action, and Illusory Reality makes one illusion real for 1 minute per day.

subclasses.name: School of Necromancy
subclasses.description: Undead scaling via Undead Thralls adds proficiency bonus to damage and HP. Inured to Undeath grants necrotic resistance and max HP bump.

subclasses.name: School of Transmutation
subclasses.description: Flexible but highly situational. Transmuter's Stone grants varying buffs to one creature, Shapechanger grants true polymorph at level 14.

subclasses.name: Bladesinging
subclasses.description: Top melee wizard. Bladesong adds INT to AC, concentration saves, and speed — enables melee combat with full wizard spell progression.

subclasses.name: Time
subclasses.description: Specializes in time manipulation. Can alter dice rolls, control initiative, freeze enemies or allies temporally, and store spells via Arcane Abeyance.

subclasses.name: Scribe Wizard
subclasses.description: Specializes in magical writing and flexible spell adaptation. Awakened Spellbook allows swapping damage types, efficient ritual casting, and spell storage.

subclasses.name: War Magic
subclasses.description: Initiative bonus and defensive reactions. Arcane Deflection grants +2 AC or +4 saves as a reaction — excellent defensive reliability at any level.

subclasses.name: Graviturgy wizard
subclasses.description: Specializes in gravity effects — alter weight, pull or push enemies, and control positioning. Gravity Well and Violent Attraction enhance movement control.

classes.name: Artificer
classes.description: Masters of invention, artificers use ingenuity and magic to unlock extraordinary capabilities in objects. They see magic as a complex system waiting to be decoded and then harnessed in their spells and inventions.
features: The Right Tool for the Job

subclasses.name: Alchemist
subclasses.description: Situational healing and buffs with weak scaling compared to other subclasses. Experimental Elixirs are random but can produce powerful effects.

subclasses.name: Artillerist
subclasses.description: Strong turret-based damage and area control. Eldritch Cannon offers Flamethrower, Force Ballista, or Protector options with solid scaling.

subclasses.name: Armorer
subclasses.description: Highly versatile armor modes — Guardian for melee tank or Infiltrator for stealth ranged. Excellent defense, flexibility, and mobility options.

subclasses.name: Battle Smith
subclasses.description: Top-tier subclass. Steel Defender provides free damage and reactions, Battle Ready uses INT for weapon attacks, and scaling makes it consistently powerful.

subclasses.name: Cartagropher
subclasses.description: Exploration and mapping focused subclass with strong out-of-combat utility and unique terrain interaction abilities.
